commands.review_summary:
The PR wires Docker-specific Node heap, tsdown heap, and DTS-skip build args through the Dockerfile/setup flow, documents them, adds a Docker memory-exhaustion hint, and updates Docker build/setup tests.

PR surface: Tests +38, Docs +12, Other +31. Total +81 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live Docker OOM reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked issue gives constrained-Docker steps and logs, and current main/release source still lacks the Docker-specific build args and OOM hint.
